---
title: Compost
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549262/compost_of6xlt.jpg
description: Compost
categories: ["generalillustration"]
date: 2021-03-29
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549262/compost_of6xlt.jpg)
